text: Walking from the empty, expectant silence of the event space into this vibrant exhibition wall, I am struck by the contrast. Here, R + D—research and development—invite curiosity and creativity. Words on the screen about sunlight, immediacy, and performance blend with the visually playful design. I feel both contemplative and energized, as if standing on a threshold between preparation and innovation. In this place, I sense the gentle hum of ideas waiting to be sparked.
